heading: Air Force Reserve Forces Policy Committee
label: 9021a Air Force Reserve Forces Policy Committee
text: There is in the Office of the Secretary of the Air Force an Air Force Reserve Forces Policy Committee. The functions, membership, and organization of that committee are set forth in .section 10305 of this title
